title: Non-record: Initial small random mini-MoE
author: joshEng1

data.description: Selected MLP up projections are replaced with seeded frozen QR random feature maps while keeping the rest of the MLP trainable.
Seeded frozen QR random bases are used for the random MLP up projections.
A learned gain vector is applied across the concatenated random hidden state.
Optional learned low-rank correction is added on top of the frozen random up projection.
A small token-dependent router rescales expert chunks from multiple random expert subspaces.
Final sliding-window evaluation is added alongside exact evaluation.

novel_contributions: Initial implementation of a small random mini-MoE follow-up to the random MLP up idea
Concatenated multiple frozen random expert bases into one single-pass random up projection
Token-dependent routing over random expert subspaces after the shared projection
Optional rank-8 or rank-16 learned correction on top of routed random features
Preservation of seed-regenerated frozen weights and state_dict exclusion for artifact efficiency
Added final sliding-window evaluation wiring in the root trainer
